_note: Metadata-only slice of the OpenTabs opentable plugin, vendored hermetically at SHA 4b17021637d2cac12b8d84d21c40e765aa7b85e9 (see vendor/opentabs-snapshot/PIN.md). Wall 1: NO dist/, NO handle() runtime is executed -- the importer (scripts/import-opentabs-catalog.mjs) reads ONLY .name/.description/.input/.group/.summary metadata. The opentabs.urlPatterns below is the AUTHORITATIVE upstream value (*://www.opentable.com/* -> service www.opentable.com). www.opentable.com derives the host stem 'www', so the dir-name STEM_OVERRIDES {opentable:'opentable'} canonicalizes the slug to opentabs__opentable__* (the same first-label-isn't-the-app-name canonicalization as cloudflare/datadog/threads/doordash). www.opentable.com is classified SENSITIVE UNCONDITIONALLY (Phase 39-01: an OpenTable reservation holds a card -- a held-card / paid reservation is payment-adjacent, so 39-01 removed the 'only if it has a paid op' conditional) in extension/config/service-denylist.json, so the merge-time classifyGate sees a screened origin and does NOT abort. defineTool/OpenTabsPlugin and the api/apiVoid transport helpers are resolved from local stubs (sdk-stub.ts, opentable-api.ts) so the importer's import() never drags the real SDK's DOM/fetch surface into node. backing:'dom' (the frozen conservative default) -> DOM-only routing; reserve_table is the PAYMENT op (api {method:'POST'}) and cancel_reservation the DESTRUCTIVE op (apiVoid {method:'DELETE'}). reserve_table is a payment op (verbPrefix 'reserve' is in the guard's PAYMENT_VERBS set) DOM-only on the unconditionally-sensitive opentable origin -> the payment-op CI guard PASSES (not safe-and-API-invocable; NO weakening -- DOM-only-on-sensitive).
name: @opentabs-dev/opentabs-plugin-opentable
